name: work-loop-best-effort-oserror-handling
title: Harden work-loop file I/O and best-effort cleanup
description: Fleet validation found a candidate-file UTF-8 boundary defect, repeated GitHub Code Quality findings for unexplained empty OSError handlers, and a fatal redundant temporary-file chmod in the shipped work-loop helper. Pin strict decoding, document intentional suppression, and keep atomic writes portable when chmod is unsupported.
creator: sdelmas
